summary: Frontend review of PR #49 (FR-PERS-001 Save Model to Browser Storage) is complete. Verdict: APPROVED. All 4 acceptance criteria satisfied, all 4 test IDs (T-FE-PERS-001-01 through T-FE-PERS-001-04) present and correctly structured. Implementation covers ActionBar.tsx, Notification.tsx, and persistenceService.ts. 4 minor non-blocking observations noted in PR review comment. No blocking issues. Ready for human gate-6b-feature-pr review of PR #49.

artifacts.name: PR Review Comment
artifacts.description: Full frontend review of PR #49 — FR-PERS-001 Save Model. Verdict: APPROVED.

artifacts.name: ActionBar component
artifacts.description: Save/Load/Export/Import buttons with async handlers, QuotaExceededError handling

artifacts.name: Notification component
artifacts.description: Success/error overlay with 3s auto-dismiss, a11y role=status

artifacts.name: persistenceService
artifacts.description: saveModel/loadModel via LocalForage with schema versioning v1.0.0

human_review_required: PR #49 requires human approval before merge (gate-6b-feature-pr)
Minor: performance test uses mocked localforage — timing is not realistic (non-blocking)
Minor: loadModel does not validate schema version on load (non-blocking for v1.0.0)
Minor: auto-dismiss timer not cleared on unmount (low risk, non-blocking)
Minor: SaveModel.behavioral.test.tsx renders full App — heavier than necessary (non-blocking)

recommended_actions: Conduct human review of PR #49 at https://github.com/sreenivasmrpivot/legobuilder-challenger-config1/pull/49
Review the 4 minor non-blocking observations in the automated review comment
Approve and merge PR #49 if satisfied with the implementation
Consider adding a TODO comment in loadModel for future schema version validation
Also review PR #57 (test PR for FR-PERS-001) on branch feature/13-save-model-persistence-test
